description: Public, local-only PDF corpus entries for PDF importer stress testing. Downloaded files are intentionally not committed to git.

entries.title: Home Recovery Alabama Sample Floor Plans
entries.license_note: Public sample plan PDF. Keep local-only unless redistribution rights are confirmed.
entries.test_intent: Multi-page real-world sample plan set with dense notes, dimensions, and page-to-page consistency checks.

entries.title: Chief Architect Grandview Residential Plan Set
entries.license_note: Vendor sample plan PDF. Keep local-only unless redistribution rights are confirmed.
entries.test_intent: Real-world residential CAD export coverage for labels, 3D text placement, and geometry density.

entries.title: Sacramento County ADU Willow Plan Set
entries.license_note: Public county sample plan PDF. Keep local-only unless redistribution rights are confirmed.
entries.test_intent: Accessible public ADU plan set for practical real-world import timing and geometry/text review.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js A1 Plans Regression PDF
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Plan-sheet regression case from a mature PDF renderer corpus.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js Alpha Transparency
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Checks transparent graphics do not crash or create misleading geometry.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js ShowText Shading Pattern
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Text plus shading interaction smoke test for vector and text render paths.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js Type3 Word Spacing
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Targets the text-mode boundary where glyphs, labels, and 3D text can diverge.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js TrueType Without cmap
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Ensures missing font maps degrade with an explicit report instead of silent mislabeling.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js Arabic CID TrueType
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Encoding and glyph preservation check for non-basic text.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js Embedded Font
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Baseline for normal embedded-font text before harder font cases.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js No-Cycle Type3 inside Type3
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Nested font/content stream safety check without intentionally cyclic content.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js Annotation Border Styles
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: Confirms annotations do not pollute editable geometry unless explicitly supported.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js Pages Tree Refs
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.

entries.title: Mozilla pdf.js S2 Regression PDF
entries.license_note: Mozilla pdf.js repository test asset. Keep acquired copy local; cite upstream.
entries.test_intent: General mixed-content renderer regression from pdf.js.

entries.title: Cal Poly PDF/VT Cerebellum 10
entries.source_org: PDF Association / Cal Poly Graphic Communications
entries.license_note: Use for local testing only. PDF Association states these files may not be publicly redistributed from any other venue and must not be altered.
entries.test_intent: Manual acquisition candidate for standards-grade performance testing after reading PDF Association usage restrictions.

entries.title: Ghent Output Suite v5
entries.license_note: Manual acquisition candidate. Keep local-only unless redistribution rights are confirmed.
entries.test_intent: Manual standards test suite for graphics workflow edge cases not usually present in shop drawings.
